0:["sDJmOYVqmA4sxQfvayZKd",[[["",{"children":["about",{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],["",{"children":["about",{"children":["__PAGE__",{},[["$L1",["$","div",null,{"className":"flex min-h-screen flex-col","children":[["$","$L2",null,{}],["$","main",null,{"className":"flex-1","children":["$","section",null,{"className":"bg-brand-cream py-20","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto max-w-3xl px-4 md:px-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto max-w-3xl text-center","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-brand-gold","children":"About"}],["$","h2",null,{"className":"font-serif text-3xl font-bold text-brand-navy md:text-4xl","children":"A network built to enforce a simple right."}],null]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose prose-lg mx-auto mt-10 text-brand-ink","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"YoursAgain is an equity-recovery network. We combine AI, public records analysis, and local human partners to identify former homeowners whose properties were sold for more than the tax debt owed — and to recover the surplus that should never have been kept."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["The Supreme Court made the law clear in"," ",["$","em",null,{"children":"Tyler v. Hennepin County"}]," (2023): when a government sells a home to satisfy a tax debt and keeps the surplus, it commits a taking under the Fifth Amendment. The homeowner must “render unto Caesar what is Caesar’s, but no more.”"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Even so, three problems remain. Most victims do not know they have a claim. The recovery process is legally and administratively complex. And the opportunity is fragmented across thousands of counties. YoursAgain exists to solve those three problems without becoming another predatory actor."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"We are structured as a federated swarm: a central AI and legal spine supports state-level entities and county-level human anchors. A parallel legal colony monitors every jurisdiction, sets risk thresholds, and ensures that a problem in one county cannot topple the network."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Our work is governed by an explicit covenant: we do not cause foreclosures, we do not surveil, we do not extract hidden fees, and we never repurpose client data. Fees are success-based and disclosed up front."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/eligibility","children":"Check Eligibility"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/contact","variant":"outline","children":"Contact Us"}]]}]]}]}]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"border-t border-brand-line bg-white","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 py-12 md:px-6","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"grid gap-8 md:grid-cols-4","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"md:col-span-2","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/","className":"flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded bg-brand-navy font-serif text-sm font-bold text-white","children":"YA"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"font-serif text-xl font-bold text-brand-navy","children":"YoursAgain"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-4 max-w-sm text-sm text-brand-muted","children":"Returning surplus home equity to former owners after tax foreclosure. AI-powered, human-guided, and bound by an explicit ethical covenant."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","h4",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-brand-navy","children":"Company"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-4 space-y-2 text-sm text-brand-muted","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/about","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"About"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/process","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"Process"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/faq","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"FAQ"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/contact","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"Contact"}]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","h4",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-brand-navy","children":"Clients"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-4 space-y-2 text-sm text-brand-muted","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/portal","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"Client Portal"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/eligibility","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"Check Eligibility"}]}],["$","li",null,{"children":["$","$L4",null,{"href":"/contact","className":"hover:text-brand-navy","children":"Report a Case"}]}]]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-between gap-4 border-t border-brand-line pt-6 text-xs text-brand-muted md:flex-row","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["© ",2026," YoursAgain.
